title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Bank:
ICICI Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank!
